label: MiniMax China
description: MiniMax-M2.7 via the China MiniMax Anthropic-compatible endpoint

promptOverlays.webfetch: When provider-specific docs or endpoint behavior are relevant, prefer configured MiniMax China resources such as the MiniMax China docs available for this isolated setup.
promptOverlays.explore: This Claude Code setup is configured for MiniMax China using MiniMax-M2.7 through the China MiniMax Anthropic-compatible endpoint. Keep model and provider assumptions consistent with that endpoint.
promptOverlays.planEnhanced: Plan with the active MiniMax China provider and MiniMax-M2.7 model mapping in mind. Do not assume first-party Claude model names or Anthropic-only behavior unless this setup explicitly configures them.

tui.headline: MiniMax China
